partial_progress.details: Made structural progress on strict density proof. Implemented contradiction cases via T4 transitivity and formula negation. 11 sorries remain in DensityFrameCondition.lean + 3 in CantorApplication.lean = 14 total. All remaining sorries require Pattern C iteration.

completion_data.completion_summary: Added contradiction proof branches for strict density theorem using case splits on G(neg(delta)) membership and CanonicalR M' witness. Inl cases proven via formula contradiction; pos cases proven via T4 transitivity. Remaining sorries (14 total) require Pattern C iteration with seriality escape.
